title: ParkingTicketPayment
description: A payment made against a parking / camera violation summons — the everyday DOF transaction. NET-NEW: there is NO public payment API; today a resident pays a ticket only through the CityPay web app (a836-citypay.nyc.gov, a PayPal/Braintree-backed form) or by mail. The read twin ('Open Parking and Camera Violations', nc67-uf89) publishes the balance, but the act of paying has no machine-readable contract. This schema serves both the PaymentRequest write surface (pay a ticket) and the receipt returned on success.

paymentId.description: Server-assigned payment / transaction id. Omit on create; returned on the receipt.

confirmationNumber.description: CityPay confirmation number. Set by DOF, not the payer.

status.description: Payment lifecycle status. Set by DOF/the payment gateway.

summonsNumber.description: The violation summons being paid ('Summons Number').

amount.description: Amount to pay, in US dollars — up to the summons Amount Due.

payFullBalance.description: Pay the full outstanding balance rather than a partial amount.

paymentMethod.description: Tender type (CityPay is backed by PayPal / Braintree).

paymentToken.description: Opaque gateway token (e.g. Braintree nonce) representing the tokenized instrument. Raw card / bank numbers are never accepted by this contract.
